creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
this is known I think.

The repo can only have either old or new, but not both.  And it affects more than just one port.

It's an entire set of either "old" or "new".  

Do you want me to pass this to X11?  I don't think anything is going to change, it just "is".  People wanting new will just have to build from source with the proper make.conf settings.
